programs.title: 100 Day Dream Home
programs.desc: A couple dreams of more space for their two kids and two horses, so they are moving to an equestrian neighborhood with a community stable.

programs.title: 100 Day Dream Home
programs.desc: Although a couple wants to downsize, they still need a home big enough to host their large dance parties; with a unique design style in mind, Brian and Mika look to build them a cultural and sexy house that sweeps them off their feet.

programs.title: 100 Day Dream Home
programs.desc: After 20 years of international deployment, a Black Hawk helicopter pilot and his wife are eager to touch down and finally settle in their Florida hometown; they're calling on Brian and Mika to fit their European tastes into a forever family home.

programs.title: 100 Day Dream Home
programs.desc: A professional chef and his wife are trading snowy Boston for sunny Florida; but when the kitchen of his dreams is far from a reality, Brian and Mika are left trying to cook up a plan to keep things from boiling over.

programs.title: 100 Day Dream Home
programs.desc: Newlyweds trade in their double-wide for a dream home fit for their family; juggling wedding plans and bold design ideas isn't easy, so Brian and Mika look to help them build a forever home and find wedded bliss along the way!

programs.title: Cheap A$$ Beach Houses
programs.desc: A large family searches for an affordable waterfront home in Cape Coral, Fla; they balance a tight budget and specific demands against the challenges of the competitive local housing market.
